summary: The implementation covers all five requirements (REQ-6 through REQ-10) related to code-based authentication and persistent login. The backend implements session storage mapping codes to user identities. The frontend includes a new useCodeAuth hook for authentication state management, a LoginPage for code-only login, automatic authentication after registration, removal of Internet Identity from Header/ConnectPage/ChatPage, and persistent local storage for sessions. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.
